scripts.test: NODE_ENV=test LOCAL_AUTH_USER_ID=local-dev LOCAL_AUTH_EMAIL=local-dev@example.com LOCAL_AUTH_GROUPS=SYSTEM_ADMIN LOCAL_AUTH_ACCOUNT_STATUS=active LOCAL_AUTH_TENANT_ID=local-test BENCHMARK_EVALUATION_ENABLED=true BENCHMARK_EVALUATION_TENANT_ID=benchmark-test node --import tsx --test --test-concurrency=1 "src/**/*.test.ts"
scripts.test:coverage: NODE_ENV=test LOCAL_AUTH_USER_ID=local-dev LOCAL_AUTH_EMAIL=local-dev@example.com LOCAL_AUTH_GROUPS=SYSTEM_ADMIN LOCAL_AUTH_ACCOUNT_STATUS=active LOCAL_AUTH_TENANT_ID=local-test BENCHMARK_EVALUATION_ENABLED=true BENCHMARK_EVALUATION_TENANT_ID=benchmark-test c8 --check-coverage --statements 90 --functions 90 --lines 90 --reporter=text-summary --reporter=json-summary node --import tsx --test --test-concurrency=1 "src/**/*.test.ts"
